arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Gent: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea begin their Conference League league phase campaign on home soil as Belgian outfit Gent visit Stamford Bridge. Gent have started the season positively and currently sit third in the Belgian Pro League through nine games.

Newcastle United are worried about 25-year-old player because of Chelsea
arts.sum: Newcastle United are working on extending Alexander Isak’s contract at the club due to fears Chelsea could reignite interest in him, according to GiveMeSport. The Blues have been linked with a move for the Sweden international in the past and with uncertainty over his contract situation at St James’ Park, the Magpies are worried that […] The post Newcastle United are worried about 25-year-old player because of Chelsea appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Gent Conference League clash predicted as unlikely goalscoring hero emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to continue their winning form of late when they host Belgian side Gent in their UEFA Conference League opener later tonight. Cole Palmer scored all four goals for Enzo Maresca's side, and victory tonight would be a fifth win in a row across all competitions.
